2169340.name: Last King - Tower Defense
2169340.description:
Last King is a fully featured tower defense game that allows you to customize your tower loadout and skill trees. There are 24 towers with their own modifiers and customization. The towers function the same way as their chess piece counterparts, allowing you to create strong formations and leverage their shooting patterns.


Much like other tower defense games, you can also play as the enemies seeking to reach the end of the path and steal the king's gold! You can upgrade your units and give them unique abilities according to their skill trees. There are dozens of options for unit customization and specialization! This sort of duality isn't in every tower defense game, and it can be a great way to mix up the routine tower defense gameplay.


Last King also allows players to play against each other over the internet, one as the towers and the other as the units. The multiplayer mode has its unique prestige system and lends massive replayability to the game.


Our game will be getting routine upgrades for the foreseeable future. You can expect the update cycle to coincide with the season changes and will have a revolving set of challenges and content.
2169340.supported_languages: 英语, 法语, 意大利语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 俄语, 西班牙语 - 拉丁美洲, 匈牙利语, 波兰语, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西
